summary: Iteration 5: Verified backend refactoring from monolithic server.py to modular route files. All 28 backend API tests pass (100%). AdminAnalytics component with recharts charts working correctly. Frontend compiles and renders without errors.

issues: Minor eslint warning: useEffect missing 'fetchTeams' dependency (line 211) - non-blocking

critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring successful - modular structure under /app/backend/core/ and /app/backend/routes/
AdminAnalytics component properly imports and uses recharts (AreaChart, BarChart, PieChart)
All data-testid attributes present for testing: admin-analytics, activity-trend-chart, onboarding-funnel, skills-distribution-chart, member-activity-table, recent-chatbot-queries
test_credentials: Admin session created via mongosh for testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend has been refactored into modular files: /app/backend/core/ (config, database, storage, auth), /app/backend/models/ (schemas), /app/backend/routes/ (auth, members, projects, case_studies, discussions, chatbot, notifications, files, admin). AdminAnalytics component added with comprehensive charts using recharts. All endpoints tested and working. Previous chatbot ObjectId serialization issue from iteration 4 appears to be resolved (chatbot queries showing in analytics).
verified_features: Projects routes: GET /api/projects returns 401 without auth
Case studies routes: GET /api/case-studies returns 401 without auth
Discussions routes: GET /api/discussions returns 401 without auth
Skills route: GET /api/skills returns 401 without auth
Chatbot routes: POST /api/chatbot/message returns 401 without auth
Admin analytics: GET /api/admin/analytics returns 401 without auth
Admin members: GET /api/admin/members returns 401 without auth
File download route: GET /api/files/{path} returns 401 without auth
Frontend login page renders with Google sign-in button
AdminAnalytics renders: activity trend chart, onboarding funnel, skills distribution, member activity table, recent chatbot queries
